settings.removeProfilePictureConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove your profile picture?
settings.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
settings.usernameInvalidChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
settings.deleteDataConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete all your data? This will remove:

• Diary entries
• Created watchlists
• Watchlist memberships
• Watched movies
• Watched series
• All episode progress
• All ratings

Your account and profile will remain intact.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently lost.
settings.dataDeleted: All your data has been deleted.
settings.importHistoryTitle: Import history from TV Time or Letterboxd
settings.importHistorySubtitle: Upload an export file, review the preview, and confirm what Kino should save.
settings.importIntro: Kino reads the export on your device before saving it to your account.
settings.importPrivacy: Your export is processed locally in the app. We only write the mapped history to your Kino account.
settings.importTvTimeBody: Upload the GDPR zip export from TV Time. Kino maps watched episodes, movie watches, and ratings.
settings.importLetterboxdBody: Upload the CSV export from Letterboxd. Kino imports watch dates, ratings, and rewatch flags.
settings.importPreviewSubtitle: Review the mapped entries before saving them.
settings.importNoFileBody: Upload a TV Time zip or Letterboxd CSV to preview the import.
settings.importUnsupported: Unsupported file format. Please upload a TV Time .zip export or a Letterboxd .csv export.
settings.importParseFailed: We could not read that file. Please try another export.
settings.importIncompleteData: Some entries are missing required data. Please review the preview and fix the highlighted rows.
settings.importCreateTitleError: We couldn't match one or more titles in TMDb.
settings.importImportedBody: We saved {{count}} items to your Kino library.
settings.importPartialBody: We saved {{saved}} items. {{skipped}} items need a quick review.

hero.headline: Remember every story worth keeping.
hero.body: Kino gives movies, series, ratings, diary entries, and shared watchlists a focused home designed for daily use.

features.headline: Built for the way you actually watch.

diary.headline: A diary that stays with you.
diary.body: Log every film and episode with a date, a rating, and a note. See exactly what you watched, when, and how you felt about it — years later.

progress.headline: Track every episode, every season.
progress.body: Mark individual episodes as watched. Track completion by season. Resume exactly where you left off without losing your place.

ratings.headline: Rate what matters to you.
ratings.body: Give every title a personal score. Watch your taste in film emerge across thousands of entries over time.

watchlists.headline: Organize what to watch next.
watchlists.body: Create private or shared watchlists. Invite friends to collaborate. Never wonder what to queue up again.

search.headline: Find anything, instantly.
search.body: Search the entire TMDB catalog — movies, TV shows, people — with filters for genre, rating, and more.

stats.headline: Understand your viewing habits.
stats.body: See your most-watched genres, highest-rated titles, and streaks as they build naturally from your diary.

community.headline: Ratings from people, not algorithms.
community.body: See how Kino users rate the same titles. Follow friends and discover new films through taste you already trust.

i18n.headline: Made for the world.
i18n.body: Kino speaks English, French, Italian, Norwegian, and Portuguese. Localized dates, localized content — feel at home wherever you are.
i18n.exampleBody: Dates, interface labels, and localized TMDB content follow the selected language.

platforms.headline: Web, mobile, and offline.
platforms.body: Available as a Progressive Web App on any browser, and natively on iOS and Android. Your library syncs instantly across all your devices.

cta.headline: Your watching life, beautifully organized.
cta.body: Free to use. No subscriptions. No tracking.

footer.tagline: A calm movie and series companion.
